zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Lewis於1697年9月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波時，他的父親John Lewis31歲，母親Elizabeth Huckins25歲。他於1719年5月14日與Rebecca Lathrop在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1747年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波法爾姆斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Lewis于1697年9月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波时，他的父亲John Lewis31岁，母亲Elizabeth Huckins25岁。他于1719年5月14日与Rebecca Lathrop在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1747年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波法爾姆斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Lewis was born on 6 September 1697, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Lewis, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Huckins, was 25. He married Rebecca Lathrop on 14 May 1719, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1747, in Falmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Lewis est né le 6 septembre 1697, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Lewis, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Huckins, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Lathrop le 14 mai 1719, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1747, à Falmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 50 ans.

September 1697 in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lewis 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Huckins 25. Er hat am 14. Mai 1719 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Rebecca Lathrop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1747 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Falmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Lewis è nato il il 6 settembre 1697 nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Lewis, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Huckins, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Lathrop il 14 maggio 1719, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1747, nel Falmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Lewisが1697年9月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父John Lewisは31歳，母Elizabeth Huckinsは25歳であった。1719年5月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルでRebecca Lathropと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1747年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルファルモウスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Lewis(이)가 1697년 9월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lewis(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Huckins(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1719년 5월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Rebecca Lathrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1747년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 파모우스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Lewis родился 6 сентября 1697 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Lewis было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Huckins, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Lathrop 14 мая 1719 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1747 г. в местности фалмоут, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет.
